== Notes for [[Item:Q90953|Q90953]] ==

'''
=Dytilaos=
'''

Dytilaos, was a Tetrarch of the Tectosagii in the 1st century BC. He was the father of Amyntas, Tetrarch of the Tectosagii and King of Cilicia Trachae.

'''Source : '''

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dytilaos,_Tetrarch_of_the_Tectosagii

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
